plugins.name: claylee-core
plugins.description: Behavioral contract rule + general code-quality protection hooks (git push warning, doc-creation blocker, console.log detection, build artifact check)

plugins.name: claylee-continuous-learning
plugins.description: Instinct-based session learning system: observes tool usage, extracts atomic instincts via background Haiku observer, evolves them into skills/commands/agents. Includes /cl:* commands.

plugins.name: claylee-e2e-testing
plugins.description: Playwright E2E testing skill with Page Object Model patterns, configuration templates, and 7 /e2e:* commands (analyze, plan, create, maintain, run, remote, record).

plugins.name: claylee-code-quality-agents
plugins.description: Four sub-agents for on-demand code work: code-review, build-error-resolver, security-reviewer, refactor-cleaner.

plugins.name: claylee-openspec
plugins.description: OpenSpec + Superpowers workflow injection. Conditionally injects workflow docs when project has openspec/ directory or .claude/openspec-enabled marker.
